name: StoneX Group Inc.
business: StoneX Group Inc. operates a global financial services network providing digital platforms, end-to-end clearing and execution services, high-touch service, and deep expertise to connect clients to financial and physical markets. It offers execution, clearing, OTC market-making, payments, advisory services, market intelligence, and physical trading in commodities. The company serves more than 80,000 commercial, institutional, and payments clients, and over 400,000 self-directed/retail accounts in over 180 countries.

exposures.sentence: We operate a global financial services network that connects companies, organizations, traders and investors to the global market ecosystem through a unique blend of digital platforms, end-to-end clearing and execution services, high touch service and deep expertise.

We provide a full range of physical trading capabilities in precious metals markets providing our clients the ability to purchase physical gold and other precious metals, in multiple forms, and in denominations of their choice; in addition, we act as a principal to facilitate physical commodity trading and provide marketing, procurement, logistics and price management services to clients across the commodity complex, including renewable fuels, grains, oil seeds, cotton, coffee, cocoa, sugar, edible oils, feed products and meats.

We provide a full range of physical trading capabilities in precious metals markets providing our clients the ability to purchase physical gold and other precious metals, in multiple forms, and in denominations of their choice.

We have built a scalable platform to provide end-to-end global payment solutions to banks and commercial businesses, as well as charities, non-governmental organizations (NGOs) and government organizations.

We offer derivative products linked to Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies in certain jurisdictions, and may expand the types of these products offered, the associated types of cryptocurrencies and the jurisdictions in which the products are offered.
Cybersecurity attacks across industries, including ours, are increasing in sophistication and frequency and may range from uncoordinated individual attempts to measures targeted specifically at us.
